emails.subject: Re: Talisman
emails.body: I knew it was Canadian and started with a "T". Am I good or what!?! When you get to be my age you'll have no memory left. Sure wish you were down here enjoying these 109+ degree days with us. It'll make you appreciate Calgary in Winter. Peter Keohane 09/06/2000 01:06 PM
